The '''MZX33291 system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Also known as the '''Bimmiel system''', it was located near a [[Pulsar/Legends|pulsar]] and contained the planet [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] and at least four other inner [[Planet/Legends|planets]], at least one of those habitable. It was discovered by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] survey team led by a man named [[Bimmiel (Imperial)|Bimmiel]].

It was located near [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]] and the [[MZX32905 system/Legends|MZX32905 system]].
